response.justification: Bogdan brings a strong 15+ year full-stack engineering background with genuine TypeScript and AWS experience, and his current role at re:cinq does involve MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure — directly relevant to the job description. However, the role requires 8+ years of AI-driven solution development, and Bogdan's AI work is limited to roughly 12 months in his current position. Critical gaps include the complete absence of Python in his skill set, no demonstrated experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and no mention of multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. The staff-level, customer-facing technical leadership dimension demands deep, battle-tested AI expertise that is not evidenced in this resume.
strengths: Active hands-on work with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, directly matching a listed key technology
Extensive TypeScript and Node.js production experience across multiple roles, including AWS CDK usage, satisfying part of the cloud platform requirement

Demonstrated staff-level seniority and a consistent knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, conference talks, mentoring dojos) aligned with the mentorship and engineering-excellence responsibilities
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list — a primary required language for the role
AI-specific experience spans only approximately 12 months at re:cinq; the role mandates 8+ years of AI-driven solution development
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalents)
